sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Tokyo</city> <country>Japan</country> <description>vivamus metus arcu adipiscing molestie hendrerit at vulputate vitae nisl aenean</description> <end_date>1992-09-26</end_date> <make>Toyota</make> <model>Landcruiser</model> <pin>3235</pin> <start_date>1984-07-16</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 05:36:37</sys_created_on> <sys_id>993e0326fd8b32107f44b9211467fec5</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 05:36:37</sys_updated_on> <vin>1D7CW5GKXAS838127</vin> <year>1984</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
